# Security

## Supported versions

Before the first Kenogram release, security fixes are made on `main`. During
v0.x, only the latest published release receives security fixes. Older v0.x
releases are unsupported; users may need to upgrade to receive a fix.

Kenogram does not currently promise acknowledgement or remediation service
levels. Confirmed vulnerabilities affecting the supported version are tracked
privately through GitHub Security Advisories. Disclosure timing is coordinated
case by case; an advisory may request a CVE when appropriate.

## Report a vulnerability

Report vulnerabilities through GitHub's private
[**Report a vulnerability**](https://github.com/idolum-ai/kenogram/security/advisories/new)
flow. Include the affected commit or release, host and Podman versions, a
minimal declaration or reproducer, observed impact, and any suggested
mitigation. Do not open a public issue containing exploit details or private
data. Never submit live credentials.
